lineup_source: England vs Croatia, Group L opener, 17 June 2026 (4-2-3-1)

players.name: Dominik Livaković
players.note: Born in Zadar; parents Croatian (mother Manuela related to footballer Josip Skoblar).

players.name: Joško Gvardiol
players.note: Born in Zagreb; father from Novigrad (near Zadar), mother from Srednjaci.

players.name: Josip Šutalo
players.note: Born in Čapljina, Bosnia and Herzegovina (ethnic Croat); plays for Croatia.

players.name: Luka Vušković
players.note: Born in Split; father Danijel played for Hajduk Split.

players.name: Josip Stanišić
players.note: Born in Munich to Croat parents (father from Malino, mother from Oriovac).

players.name: Luka Modrić
players.note: Born in Zadar; father from Modrići, mother from Kruševo near Obrovac.

players.name: Mario Pašalić
players.note: Born in Mainz, Germany; father a Bosnian Croat (near Tomislavgrad), mother from Vrlika. Parents emigrated during the Yugoslav Wars.

players.name: Petar Sučić
players.note: Born in Livno, Bosnia and Herzegovina, into a Bosnian Croat family.

players.name: Ivan Perišić
players.note: Born in Split; parents from Omiš.

players.name: Martin Baturina
players.note: Born in Zürich during father Mate Baturina's stint with Grasshoppers; raised in Split.

players.name: Petar Musa
players.note: Born in Zagreb; father Željko a Bosnian Croat from Široki Brijeg.
